title: Create: Transmission!
description: Minecraft Create addon that adds a single block: Transmission Chain! This block can be used to power belts in a cleaner way without using encased chain drive.
body:
This addon for create adds the Transmission Chain! Its a useful block that can be used to transfer rotational power between belts.

![Workbench crafting recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1354280/description_e8fd8f30-3abc-40f5-99ec-cc3884095006.png)

![Deployer crafing recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1354280/description_073bf77b-1aa3-4fa9-af01-48c696c6f994.png)

It can be used to connect right angle belts, consecutive belts and even belts that are on top of each other!

![Showcase](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1354280/description_206dec95-bb0f-4902-9a1c-8c04cde6ea5d.gif)

It is designed to simplify belt powering and avoid clunky setup with gearboxes and encased chain drives without making them obsolete! The transmission chain in fact can be only placed on belts!

Here are some examples of the improvements:

![Example 1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_053a5d14-0bd6-423e-b8fc-e3c432a95728.png)

![Example 2](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_3cbaa15c-ea47-47aa-b758-cb92db420d87.png)

![Example 3](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_8db55b6b-a83f-4e1d-a426-d35e11b7700e.png)

![Example 4](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_67faabc5-d517-48e4-ab15-ff9f010b834d.png)

![Example 5](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ccc25b24-e4ba-4940-b53f-6ee19fa6566f.png)

It can also be encased like belts!

![Example encasing](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_971272f1-3035-4e10-a15e-9c7fd0fe1805.png)  
I hope you will enjoy my mod! Have fun!

![Before | After](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1e8c87e3-831e-4187-9374-59ac8179c0c6.gif)
